creator: livitin@itprofservice.ru
text:
I have Hewlett Packard Proliant DL 

When I try to run arp -a command system show me an error:
[Tyrolit]gw# arp  -i bge0 -a
MARINA.tyrolit.local (192.168.20.84) at 00:11:11:08:fa:01 on bge0 [ethernet]
Segmentation fault (core dumped).

I updated whole system as in the /usr/src/UPDATING. The error still appears.
My dmesg:
